# ABCurves vendoring note

This directory contains the unmodified zlib 1.3.2 library sources needed by the
static `abct_zlib` target. They were copied from the official `v1.3.2` tag at
<https://github.com/madler/zlib>, resolved to commit
`da607da739fa6047df13e66a2af6b8bec7c2a498`.

The upstream `LICENSE`, `README`, and `ChangeLog` are retained here. The same
license is distributed in participant packages as `licenses/ZLIB.txt`.
